member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Builders.StubClaimsPrincipalBuilder
member.summary: Builds stubbed instances for testing token generation and validation.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Builders.StubClaimsPrincipalBuilder.For(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser)
member.summary: Creates a claims principal for the specified stub user.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Builders.StubClaimsPrincipalBuilder.WithRoles(System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a claims principal with the specified roles and optional user ID.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Builders.StubClaimsPrincipalBuilder.WithRoles(System.Guid,System.String[])
member.summary: Creates a claims principal with the specified user ID and roles.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Builders.StubClaimsPrincipalBuilder.Anonymous
member.summary: Creates an anonymous claims principal with no identity.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Data.StubRoleData.AllowedRole
member.summary: Defines the set of allowed stub roles for testing scenarios.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Data.StubUserData
member.summary: Provides canned instances for testing scenarios. Mirrors the domain's IdentityUser shape.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Data.StubUserData.Default
member.summary: Default stub user with predictable values.

member.name: F:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Data.StubUserData.Admin
member.summary: Admin stub user with elevated role semantics.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Data.StubUserData.Create(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Factory method for creating ad-hoc stub users.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Models.StubRefreshToken
member.summary: Represents a test-safe version of RefreshToken for identity testing.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser
member.summary: Stub user entity for testing and mocking Identity flows. Inherits from built-in IdentityUser with Guid key.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser.DisplayName
member.summary: Optional display name for test scenarios.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser.IsLockedOut
member.summary: Optional flag to simulate locked-out users.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser.IsEmailConfirmed
member.summary: Optional flag to simulate confirmed email.

member.name: P:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser.Roles
member.summary: In-memory role list for testing IUserRoleStore. Not present in real IdentityUser; simulated for test scenarios.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Entities.StubUser.ToString
member.summary: Optional override for ToString in test logs.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Factories.StubJwtOptionsFactory
member.summary: Factory for creating test-safe instances. Used to configure token generation logic in unit and integration tests.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Factories.StubJwtOptionsFactory.CreateDefault
member.summary: Creates a default instance with hardcoded values. Suitable for most token generation tests.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Factories.StubRevocableTokenManager
member.summary: Stub implementation of IRevocableTokenManager for unit testing. Simulates token generation, validation, and revocation behavior.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Managers.StubUserManager
member.summary: Stubbed UserManager for testing Identity flows without EF or external dependencies.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Services.StubTokenService
member.summary: Stub implementation of for unit tests. Provides deterministic, test-safe behavior.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Stub.Stores.StubUserStore
member.summary: In-memory stub implementation of IUserStore for testing Identity flows.
